description: Elevate your beauty routine with Black Girl Vitamins Collagen Gummies, expertly formulated to support radiant skin, strong nails, and healthy hair. Each Lime-flavored gummy delivers Hydrolyzed Collagen Peptides, complemented by Vitamin C, Vitamin E, and Biotin, to nourish your body from within. Crafted with clean, gluten-free ingredients and free from GMOs, soy, and dairy, we design our gummies with your wellness as the first principle! As part of a brand committed to addressing health disparities in Black communities, these supplements offer a delicious and convenient way to support your natural glow. Simply enjoy two gummies daily to help maintain your beauty and wellness goals.
features: Promotes Radiant Hair, Skin & Nails – Formulated with Collagen, Biotin, Vitamin C, and Vitamin E to support stronger hair, glowing skin, and healthier nails.
Supports Joint & Bone Health – Collagen aids in maintaining joint flexibility and bone strength, contributing to overall mobility.
Delicious Lime Flavor – Enjoy a refreshing Lime taste in a convenient gummy form, making daily supplementation enjoyable.
Clean, Gluten-Free Formula – Free from artificial flavors, synthetic colors, dairy, and high fructose corn syrup, suitable for various dietary preferences.
Strengthens Hair Strands – Collagen provides essential amino acids that support keratin production, helping to reduce breakage and promote healthier, fuller-looking hair.
title: Black Girl Vitamins - Collagen Gummies for Hair, Skin, and Nail Support, with Vitamin C, Vitamin E, and Biotin, Gluten-Free, (Lime), 60ct
